paricchad 10 U.
1 To cover, clothe; darbhaistaṃ paricchādya  Pt. 2 ; dvīpicarmaparicchannaḥ (gardabhaḥ)  H. 3. 9. 
2 To hide, conceal.
3 To surround with.
